title: Neste Reports Sluggish Voluntary SAF Demand
content: Neste Corp. on Oct. 24 released third quarter financial results, reporting that its renewables segment has been impacted by overcapacity and lower-than-expected voluntary demand for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). Heikki Malinen, president and CEO of Neste, said overcapacity in renewable fuel markets is creating pressure on margins. â€œAlthough we estimate that Neste has been able to demonstrate the best margins in the industry, supported by our distinctive competitive advantages for example in feedstock, pretreatment and global optimization, we need to accelerate our efforts to improve our competitiveness,â€ he said.
author: Analysts Account
